title: UNet-ResNet + NAFNet: deblurring-aware three-class crop/weed segmentation
description: Reference implementation accompanying the manuscript by Li and Zou. Includes the UNet-ResNet three-class segmentation network (background, crop/sorghum, weed; ResNet-18/34/50/101 encoders), the NAFNet deblurring front-end, the two-stage restoration-aware training protocol, evaluation and complexity-analysis scripts, and the stratified 70/15/15 data splits over the public DeBlurWeedSeg dataset.

creators.name: Li, Qiyue
creators.affiliation: College of Plant Protection, Shandong Agricultural University

creators.name: Zou, Shenshen
creators.affiliation: College of Plant Protection, Shandong Agricultural University
